indications.text:
1.1 Hypertension
Diovan® (valsartan) is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood pressure. Lowering blood pressure
reduces the risk of fatal and nonfatal cardiovascular events, primarily strokes and myocardial infarctions. These benefits
have been seen in controlled trials of anti...

Hypertension
Diovan® (valsartan) is indicated for the treatment of hypertension. It may be used alone or in
combination with other antihypertensive agents.
Heart Failure
